Fix top gap on mobile menu by aligning to top instead of center

items-center was vertically centering content in h-screen, creating
equal empty space above and below. Switch to items-start on mobile
so content starts from the top; desktop keeps items-center.

commit.message:
feat: Session 463 — sharp consensus signal, counter-market filter, retrain sha256 fix

- New shadow signal: sharp_consensus_under (69.3% HR, N=205, 5-season validated)
  Compound: line dropped 0.5+ AND cross-book std >= 1.0 → smart money UNDER
- New active filter: counter_market_under (blocks 43.2% HR UNDER picks)
  Blocks UNDER when line rose 0.5+ with high book disagreement
- Fix weekly-retrain: model_sha256 → sha256_hash (column name mismatch)
- 61 signals registered, 236 tests passing

commit.message:
feat(orca): extract to Composer package with pre-compiled CSS/JS

Move Orca from Modules/ to packages/MakeDev/Orca as a standalone
Composer package. Ship pre-compiled Tailwind CSS and JS via route-based
asset serving (like Flux) — zero config for the host app.

- Compile utilities-only CSS with theme(inline) so no CSS variable conflicts
- Serve dist/orca.css and dist/orca-annotator.js via /orca/* routes with caching
- Inject <link> and <script> tags automatically via InjectLauncher middleware
- Remove vendor:publish for assets and Tailwind @source requirement
- Add build:orca and dev:orca npm scripts to root project
- Install is now just: composer require + migrate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix video sound in film library: muted autoplay + tap-for-sound unmute

Mobile browsers block unmuted autoplay when video.play() is called outside
a direct user gesture (e.g., inside useEffect). VideoModal now starts muted
(which always succeeds) and shows a "Tap for sound" button that unmutes
within a direct click gesture, matching the featured reel pattern.

Harden fraud detection: fix blocklist bypass, single env flag, proper HTTP codes

- Fix _classify_producer: blocklist-first with explicit chrome/chromium collision handling
  prevents bypass where whitelisted Creator masked blocked Producer (e.g. PDFgear + iText)
- Remove date parsing and linearization checks (false positive sources)
- Consolidate DUPLICATE_DETECTION_ENABLED + RECEIPT_AGE_CHECK_ENABLED into single
  FRAUD_DETECTION_ENABLED flag
- Change ReceiptFraudError HTTP status from 400 to 422 with top-level error_code
- Add warning log on upload-time fraud blocks with user_id context
- Remove unused ReceiptTooOldError exception
- Add receipt_time to fingerprint hash for better dedup accuracy

commit.message:
Fix mycamgirl.net data fetching — retry logic, cutoff detection, null handling

Historical fetch (/api/data-fetch/historical):
- Add retry logic (2 retries with backoff) for failed API page fetches
- Fix cutoff detection: only stop when ALL activities on a page are before
  30-day cutoff, not just the first one (activities aren't always sorted)
- Skip activities with null/zero seconds (they create 0-duration intervals)
- Skip offline entries from stream_segments (only track actual streams)
- Increase page cap from 30 to 50 for better coverage
- Use .maybeSingle() instead of .single() to avoid errors on missing rows
- Track consecutive failures and stop after 3 in a row
- Mark failed jobs with completed_at timestamp
- Return activity count in response for debugging

Cron scraper (/api/cron/scrape-cam-data):
- Fetch second-to-last page too when last page has <50 items
- Filter for valid durations (skip null seconds)
- Determine live status from most recent ONLINE activity (not any activity)
- Filter today's activities by overlap with today (not just end time)
- Skip offline entries from stream_segments
- Increase live detection window from 20 to 25 minutes
- Use .maybeSingle() for upsert checks

Cam accounts tab:
- Add "Re-fetch 30 days" button per cam account for manual retry

commit.message:
fix: document Zustand selector rule to prevent infinite render loop (closes #6)

Inline object selectors (s) => ({ a, b }) return a new ref every render,
causing useSyncExternalStore to loop. Added a top-of-file comment enforcing
the one-call-per-value pattern already used in AgentStepper and CopilotChat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(recorder-bot): graceful subscribe when transcript permission pending

Subscribe endpoint now handles transcript subscription failure independently
so recording subscription still succeeds when admin hasn't granted
OnlineMeetingTranscript.Read.All consent yet. Returns status: 'partial'.

Configure the Fox router with RedirectSlash and RedirectPath options so that

form, and requests with malformed paths (double slashes, dot segments) get
a 307 redirect to the cleaned path.

Initial commit: ToothHurts Flutter/Flame game

Cross-platform baby teeth counting game for iOS, Google Play, and Amazon.
Canvas-drawn visuals, no image assets required.

Features:
- Tap teeth to count them; hold too long = baby bites
- Random autonomous snap mechanic for unpredictable bites
- Complications: tongue, throw-up, pacifier, foot
- Baby types: human (lv1-4), alligator (lv5-8), fish (lv9+)
- Tapping a counted tooth resets all counts
- HUD respects Dynamic Island / notch safe area
- Android flavors: google, amazon (APK-only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: shouldForwardProp theme wiring, dynamic fn params, and consolidation (#309)

Three bugs in the shouldForwardProp emission path:

1. Broken dynamic function params: `unwrapArrowFunctionToPropsExpr` replaced
   `props.$size` → bare `$size` in the body but left `props` as the function
   parameter, producing undefined references like `Math.round($size * ...)`.
   Fix: use `unwrapArrowFunctionToPropsExpr` only when a single transient prop
   is detected (rewriting both param and body), falling back to
   `inlineArrowFunctionBody` which preserves `props.$size` access.

2. Theme conditionals not wired up: `emitShouldForwardPropWrappers` never
   called `appendThemeBooleanStyleArgs`, so `containerDark`/`containerLight`
   style keys were emitted in `stylex.create()` but never referenced in JSX.
   Fix: call `appendThemeBooleanStyleArgs` + `buildUseThemeDeclaration` in
   both code paths of the shouldForwardProp emitter.

3. Redundant dynamic functions: when multiple CSS properties depend on the
   same transient prop (e.g., `$size` → width, height, fontSize, lineHeight),
   each got its own style function. New `consolidateSameJsxPropStyleFns` step
   merges them into a single function. Guarded to only apply to `$`-prefixed
   props on shouldForwardProp components.

Also removes leftover debug `console.error` lines from rule-interpolated-declaration.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add smart list continuation on Enter in editor (#21)

When pressing Enter on a line with a list prefix (bullets, ordered lists,
checkboxes), automatically continue the list on the next line with matching
indentation and prefix. Ordered list numbers are auto-incremented and
subsequent items are renumbered. Pressing Enter on an empty list item
(just the prefix with no content) removes the prefix, ending the list.

Supported prefixes: "- ", "* ", "1. ", "- [ ] ", "- [x] "

commit.message:
refactor(deploy): single-file CF Worker + D1 with worker-logs RPC (#4)

* refactor(db): migrate from better-sqlite3 to bun:sqlite

Switch to Bun's built-in SQLite driver to eliminate native binding
compilation in Docker and simplify deployment. Adds DB_PATH env var
support for configuring database location in production.

- Replace better-sqlite3 + @types with bun:sqlite (built-in)
- Add DB_PATH env var override (defaults to project root)
- Update query type signatures to bun:sqlite generic order
- Export app from index.ts for integration tests
- Add tests/ to tsconfig include

Co-Authored-By: Arc <224894192+arc0btc@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore(deploy): add Dockerfile, fly.toml, CI, and env example

Packages the app for production deployment:
- Dockerfile using oven/bun:1, mounts /data for SQLite persistence
- .dockerignore excludes test files and local DBs
- fly.toml for Fly.io: shared-cpu-1x, 256MB, /data volume
- .env.example documents PORT and DB_PATH
- GitHub Actions CI: bun install + bun test on push/PR

Co-Authored-By: Arc <224894192+arc0btc@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor(deploy): replace Docker/Fly.io with Cloudflare Worker + D1

- Remove Dockerfile, .dockerignore, fly.toml
- Add wrangler.toml with D1 database binding
- Add src/worker.ts as CF Worker entry point
- Extract DbClient interface (src/types.ts) with two implementations:
  - src/db-bun.ts for local dev (bun:sqlite)
  - src/db-d1.ts for production (Cloudflare D1)
- Refactor src/app.ts as Hono app factory (takes DbClient)
- Routes use async DB client from Hono context
- Keep bun local dev working (bun run dev)
- Add wrangler scripts (cf:dev, deploy)
- Update CLAUDE.md with new architecture

* refactor: single-file CF Worker with worker-logs RPC and production routing

- Replace multi-file architecture (app.ts, auth.ts, db-*.ts, routes/, worker.ts)
  with single src/index.ts Hono app directly on D1
- Switch wrangler.toml → wrangler.jsonc with worker-logs RPC service binding
- Production-only env (hub.aibtc.com), drop staging
- Add schema.sql for D1 initialization
- Add /llms.txt and /.well-known/agent.json discovery endpoints
- Add request logging middleware via worker-logs RPC (fire-and-forget)
- CORS enabled for public read access
- Clean package.json: hono + CF workers types only

Co-Authored-By: Arc <224894192+arc0btc@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: remove dead code, batch capability inserts, clean config

- Remove unused jsonOk helper (all routes use c.json())
- Deduplicate URL parsing in logging middleware
- Batch capability DELETE + INSERTs for atomicity (DB.batch)
- Remove unused JSX config from tsconfig (pure JSON API)
- Normalize LogsBinding to interface for consistency

Fix linarith failure in equilibriumMaxwellian_T_unique

linarith cannot derive T₁ = T₂ from 2*π*T₁ = 2*π*T₂ because π is not
a literal — it needs nonlinear reasoning. Switch to nlinarith with
Real.pi_pos hint.
